title: User Import Result Schema
description: Result of a CSV user import. Import is NOT atomic by design: valid rows are created even when other rows fail, so a single bad line does not discard the file. Imported users are created WITHOUT an activation email — the admin invites them deliberately via POST /admin/users/bulk-send-activation.

skipped.description: Rows skipped because the email already exists (not an error)

row.description: 1-based row number in the uploaded file, including the header row, so the admin can find the line in their spreadsheet

message.description: Human-readable reason, shown verbatim to the admin
